links.description: Alexander Chen made a drum machine entirely out of text using Pretext + Gemini. Each character triggers a sound.

links.description: Kevin Ho: 52 biomarker blocks that expand as you explore, reflowing text across every block every frame. 0.04ms for all 52 layouts.

links.description: PHP port of chenglou/pretext with ICU segmentation and injectable font measurement.

links.description: Space-themed interactive showcase — destroy poetry with your spaceship.
